title: spyridium polycephalum
intro: Spyridium polycephalum, also known as the many-headed spyridium or many-headed spyrid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to eastern Australia, particularly in the subtropical and temperate regions. The medicinal properties of Spyridium polycephalum include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin infections. The plant's health benefits, when consumed as a herbal preparation, are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress.
